arts.ttl: Celtic manager insists pain of Rangers loss doesn't override the facts
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers knows Celtic are in a good place at the halfway stage.

arts.ttl: What Celtic brilliantly posted on social media minutes after Rangers draw 3-3 at Hibernian
arts.sum: Celtic added an open-mouthed smiling emoji and a thumbs-up alongside the image, with many in the comments section applauding the admin of the account for timing the tweet to perfection because everyone knows what they are hinting at. On Sunday, Rangers recorded a 3-3 draw at Hibernian, despite being 2-0 up and proved how much of a fluke that Celtic performance was.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd’s pre-match rant as Rangers bottle it vs Hibs and wipe out Celtic result
arts.sum: However, Kris Boyd fired Rangers a warning after their Celtic win with a pre-match rant before the Hibs draw where his prediction about the Ibrox club’s away from came true. “You look at the games Saint Mirren, Kilmarnock, Aberdeen, Celtic are different, but the draw at Hearts, the games that Rangers have lost, they’ve been bullied.

arts.ttl: I struggled at Celtic but now I'm quizzed on Brazil eligibility
arts.sum: Alexandro Bernabei has revealed his ambition is now to line up alongside Lionel Messi for Argentina after he completed his £4 million move from Celtic.

arts.ttl: Celtic sent message about Reo Hatate's form and players being picked based off transfer fees
arts.sum: Allan stated that he would have started Luke McCowan, alongside Hatate and Callum McGregor at Ibrox, as he cited the player being a boyhood Celtic fan as a reason for that. Luke McCowan, for me, would have probably been the one I would have gone with (at Ibrox) just because he is a massive Celtic fan and, for me, coming off the bench and being patient by actually showing good quality.

Both Celtic and St Mirren are looking to put disappointing defeats in midweek behind them, as they meet in the Scottish Premiership at Parkhead on Sunday afternoon. Defeat on derby day hasn't been to...

arts.ttl: 'I saw'... Paulo Bernardo on Arne Engels being hit by missile in Rangers vs Celtic clash
arts.sum: Other incidents that have marred the Rangers vs Celtic Ibrox Glasgow Derby Indeed, this isn’t the first time incidents like this have happened when Celtic have visited Ibrox but everyone connected to the club will certainly be hoping that it is the last.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton's fiery exchange & drops Champions League truth bombs to Man City fan about Celtic
arts.sum: So when a Man City, fan tried to use that as an excuse for his own team’s failures in the league this season, Celtic hero Chris Sutton wasn’t having any of it as he sent him a serious Champions League reminder about his old club. Despite having resources that vastly outstrip Celtic, the English club is lagging behind the Hoops in the Champions League as a City fan tried to defend his team’s domestic season by having a swipe at Celtic.

arts.ttl: Mark Wilson names Celtic duo Brendan Rodgers is treating differently after Ibrox horror show
arts.sum: Mark Wilson stated that, going by the two performances, Rodgers is treating Auston Trusty and Liam Scales differently in Celtic colours. Wilson told Open Goal that Rodgers isn’t holding ‘Scales to the same standards’ by not dropping him, as he doesn’t know what has happened to Trusty.

arts.ttl: Celtic January sale escalates as Bernabei breaks cover with £5m exit 'agreed' and Palma addressed by Vieira
arts.sum: Some big paydays look to be on the way to Parkhead
